chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 40 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of CMA No.153/2024 (Stay/App) 3. For hearing of main case 13.02.2024. Petitioners are present in person. Syed Sardar Ali Shah Rizvi, Additional Prosecutor General. Mr. Saeed Ahmed Wassan, AAG Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Respondent No.4 Investigating Officer of Crime No.169 of 2023 registered at Police Station Kumb, District Khairpur under Sections 365-B, 452 PPC is present, files a copy of statement of alleged abductee Mst. Kausar Khatoon (Petitioner No.1) recorded under Section 161 CrPC, and states that as per her statement, she being sui juris has contracted marriage with Hameedullah (Petitioner No.2) with her own accord and freewill and is living happily with him in a pleasant atmosphere. She has further stated that her father (Respondent No.5) has lodged abovementioned false FIR regarding her abduction, which is nothing but bundles of lies, as she was never abducted or enticed by anyone. Investigating Officer further states that he will file a copy of such statement along with his report before the concerned Magistrate for disposal of the above FIR in accordance with law. Both the petitioners on being satisfied with the statement of Investigating Officer do not press this petition. Accordingly, the same stands disposed of with directions to official respondents to provide protection to the couple in accordance with law, as and when they needed. J U D G E J U D G E Irfan/PA
